labels: "meetup-topic, community"

---

## What do you want to share?
*Choose one of the options below and delete the others to keep it clean!*

- [ ] **📰 3D Printing News / Drama** (New printers, slicer updates, industry news)
- [ ] **🛠️ Show & Tell** (Something cool you built, printed, or are currently working on)
- [ ] **💡 Quick Tip / Modification** (A neat trick, fix, or mod you found)
- [ ] **❓ Question / Troubleshooting** (Need help from the community?)

---

## The Details
*Give us the rundown! What is this about and why should we cover it?*



## Useful Links 🔗
*Drop any relevant links here so we can show them on the slides.*

- **Article / Source:** [Link here]
- **YouTube Video:** [Link here]
- **Reddit / Forum Discussion:** [Link here]
- **GitHub Repo (if applicable):** [Link here]

## Pictures / Media 📸
*If this is a Show & Tell or you have screenshots, drag and drop them right here!*

*Note: We try to cover as many community topics as possible during the weekly meetups. Thank you for contributing!*
